Contractors for pile silage, plastics | servicios agricolas parva, plasticos parva | The cost of "supplements made at the farm" covers all expenses involved in producing these feeds. This includes contractor costs for raking, baling, and wrapping (for baleage or silage), as well as incidentals like transport of feed back to the milking area. For example, a budget might include the cost of making 400 bales of baleage, covering all contractor and handling costs.
